autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero disables retries.

url.title: Cato API URL
url.description: Cato GraphQL API endpoint. Production endpoints must use HTTPS; HTTP is accepted only for loopback test endpoints.

site_selector.title: Site selector
site_selector.description: Space-separated simple patterns matched against Cato site ID or site name. Use exclusions such as '!lab-* *'. Exclusions win across site identity fields.

proxy_url.title: Proxy URL
proxy_url.description: HTTP proxy URL. Empty value uses environment proxy variables.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a Virtual Node.

vnode.ui:placeholder: To use this option, first create a Virtual Node and then reference its name here.
